title: Agent Execution Protocol (AEP) v0.1
description: Wire format for the Agent Execution Protocol. Built on CloudEvents 1.0 (envelopes), OpenTelemetry GenAI semantic conventions and span identification (data attribute names), JSON-RPC 2.0 (RPC payloads), MCP (tool descriptors), Agent Skills (SKILL.md), and JSON Schema 2020-12 (this document). AEP-specific concepts — verifier, boundary, the no-mid-run-reach-in topology, the trajectory-as-source-of-truth contract — live under the `aep.*` attribute namespace. See FOUNDATIONS.md for the full mapping rationale.
